title: Add confetti to status of label column
excerpt: Hi, we like to use custom label fields for status, and use “Complete” for “Done.” Can I add confetti to “Complete?” Thanks

posts.author: higheredpmo (Sandy Bury)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, we like to use custom label fields for status, and use “Complete” for “Done.” Can I add confetti to “Complete?” Thanks

posts.author: skmdc (SK)
posts.cookedHtml: Just go to Edit Lables, and rename the Done to Completed and you can also change the color.
